resume_string:
Samudraneel Sarkar
(cid:131) +91 8337053728 # samudraneel05@gmail.com § github/samudraneel05 (cid:239) samudraneel−sarkar
codeforces/samudraneel05 ª kaggle/samudraneel05 leetcode/samudraneel05
Education
Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology, Allahabad 2023 - 2027
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science CPI: 7.89/10
Key Courses: Data Structures and Algorithms, Object Oriented Programming, AI-ML
Indian Institute of Technology, Madras 2023 - 2027
Bachelor of Sciences in Data Science and Applications (Remote) CGPA: 8.70/10
Key Courses: DBMS, App Development, System Commands, Operating Systems
Pathfinder H.S. Public School, Kolkata 2021 - 2023
West Bengal Council of Higher Secondary Education Percentage: 90.20 %
St. Lawrence High School, Kolkata 2011 - 2021
West Bengal Board of Secondary Education Percentage: 96.86 %
Experience
Data Annotator | Alignerr AI (Remote) May 2025 – Present
• Evaluated LLM conversations to assess correctness of tool usage, API calls, and reasoning flow.
• Annotated and transcribed 140+ complex audio and video files for ingestion into ASR model training pipelines.
Open Source Contributor | PrettyTable (22M+ monthly users) Feb 2025 – Mar 2025
• Integrated MediaWiki table support via a 350+ line Pull Request (PR) 2 featured in version release v3.15.0.
• Refactored test cases across modules, increasing test coverage to 96% — a 2.2% improvement in maintainability.
Prompt Engineer | Outlier AI (Remote) Aug 2024 – Jan 2025
• Created 180+ STEM prompts and responses in LaTeX and Markdown for finetuning multimodal AI models.
• Validated 70+ model responses querying 10+ API endpoints, parsing JSON outputs for factual accuracy.
Research & Publications
Abusive Comment Detection in Transliterated Bengali Corpus Using ML and DL Techniques 2 Sep 2025
• Presented at 1st Conference on Next-Generation Networks and Deployable Artificial Intelligence, MNNIT Allahabad
Projects
Agentic Trip Planner § ¯ | TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, React, LangGraph, MCP, Docker May 2025
• Leveraged Model Context Protocol (MCP) and LangGraph to generate personalized multi-stop itineraries.
• Integrated LLM-based intent detection for queries and 18+ agent tools including web search and more.
• Implemented smart routing and itinerary optimization using OpenTripMap, Amadeus, and Google Places APIs.
• Built a full-stack system with a React-Tailwind frontend featuring real-time chat and itinerary visualization.
Hackalyze § ¯ | Langchain, Hugging Face Transformers, Tensorflow, Tesseract OCR, MERN Apr 2025
• Developed an AI-powered Hackathon Judge that automates evaluation by using Gemini for contextual scoring.
• Implemented dynamic insights like innovation metrics and theme relevance via LLM-driven feedback.
• Used Tesseract OCR to parse handwriting/images and a microservice-based MERN stack for backend services.
Resume Analyzer § ¯ | spaCy, scikit-learn, pandas, NLTK, TextBlob, RegEx, Streamlit Oct 2024
• Built a pipeline to parse, analyze, and rank resumes from ZIPs using spaCy, PyPDF2, and scikit-learn.
• Extracted education, experience, and 50+ skills with 95% precision via advanced NLP and RegEx techniques.
• Enabled resume-to-JD matching using TF-IDF and cosine similarity, reducing manual shortlisting effort by 70%.
Technical Skills
Languages: Python (proficient), C, Java, HTML/CSS
Developer Tools & Frameworks: Git, Django, Flask, StreamLit, MaterialUI, Bootstrap
Libraries: pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, Keras, TensorFlow, LangChain, LagGraph, spaCy, OpenCV, Stable-Baselines3
Databases and Cloud: MySQL, Firebase, MongoDB, PineconeDB
Achievements
Morgan Stanley Code To Give India Hackathon 2025 Top 8 Finalist out of 40,000 applicants
Selected by faculty to attend the 5th Int’l Workshop on Generative AI & Human-Robot Interaction, IIIT Allahabad
Winner - Turing’s Playground (2025), Second Runner-Up - Hackify (2025) and Finalist - CodeSangam (2024), MNNIT
Advanced Placement Scholar in Calculus AB & BC, Physics C Mechanics, and Computer Science A
Positions of Responsibilities and Extracurricular Activities
Lead | Computer Coding Club, MNNIT Oct 2024 – Present
• Organized and led workshops on Deep Learning and its Applications for over 200 students.
Coordinator | Literary Club, MNNIT Sep 2024 – Present
• Led a team of 50 to boost participation in quizzes and ’Eloquence’, MNNIT’s flagship literary event.
AI Project Mentor | Robotics Club, MNNIT Aug 2024 – Present
• Mentored junior students in problem-solving and coordinated coding competitions of 45+ students.
Volunteer-In-Charge | Rotaract Club, MNNIT Aug 2023 – Present
• Conducted initiatives like blanket donations, blood donation drives and orphanage visits, helping over 600 people.
